title: Building things that matter.
paragraphs: I'm a Computer Science student who loves turning ideas into experiences people remember. My sweet spot sits between software engineering, interaction design, and the kind of curiosity that keeps me iterating until a project feels alive.

I enjoy shipping full-stack products, exploring creative frontends with WebGL, and learning by building. Whether it's solving algorithmic problems or polishing micro-interactions, I care deeply about thoughtful systems and human-centered execution.
